title: Comfort Collections Memory Foam Pebble Bath Mat Set Pedestal Bathroom Rug 2 Piece Soft Absorbent Non Slip Red Bath Mat (50CM X 80 CM) & Pedestal Mat (50CM X 40 CM) Approximate
features: PEBBLE EFFECT DESIGN - Special technical process combined with memory foam and soft rubber, in order to strengthen the water absorption. It has three-dimensional utility memory foam fabric that conforms to your body while maintaining air circulation.
NON SLIP MICROFIBER MATS- The bottom is made of high quality memory foam material. You will not slip or slide, when you step on it.
WASHING INSTRUCTIONS – Do Not Wash, Dot Not Iron, Do Not Bleach. It brings superior safety in your bathroom and toilets. Before use, please dry the floor intended for mat placement.
GREAT ABSORBENCY - The chenille area rug can absorb water quickly, it has strong water-absorbent ability because of plenty of rubber shags can keep your room floors dry and clean.
All Photographs are for illustration purposes only. Actual colours may vary slightly from photos due to photography and/or screen/display settings.
description: Product Description 2PC Pebbles Memory Foam Bath & Pedestal Mat Sets 2PC Pebbles Memory Foam Bath & Pedestal Mat Sets Non Slip Soft Bathroom Rugs Size: Bath Mat Size: 50 x 80 cm, Pedestal Mat Size: 50 x 40 cm. 11 Colours Luxury Memory Foam 2pcs Bath Mat Sets Non Slip Water Absorbent Bathroom Rugs We proudly presents Memory Foam Bath Set in 11 different striking colours to match your bath rooms and to enhance the look. This Luxurious 2 Pc Bath & Pedestal Mat Set has a Pattern of Pebble Design which is Slip Resistant and Water Absorbent. It has the Cushioned Steps which makes sure that your feet are taken care of. The Waterproof Backing restrains water from touching your skin and make you feel uncomfortable. On the other hand, please refer to the instructions in the packing. Size Measurements: Bath Mat: 50 cms x 80 cms Pedestal Mat: 50 cms x 40 cms 11 Colours: Black, Cream, Grey, Red, Natural, Pink, Purple, Royal Blue, Silver, Aqua, Duck Egg. PEBBLES BATH MAT Actual Colour May Vary Slightly from the Picture due to Lighting Effects & Different Screen Display
